title: Donwload files in batch from a group - not available anymore?
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
Since yesterday, it is not possible anymore to download all the files in the file colums from a specific group. Only the number of files in the column is now displayed… We use this function A LOT and it saves u…

posts.author: pdoiron-cadrin (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

Since yesterday, it is not possible anymore to download all the files in the file colums from a specific group. Only the number of files in the column is now displayed… We use this function A LOT and it saves us a lot of time!

There is a file view, but honnestly it is not as convinient. Can we bring back the old way of dowloading and viewing files please?

Thank you!

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Fully support this.

We need the mass File download for our purposes as well and are building our workflow around it
